---
title: Trombinoscope
description: Promotion 2023-2024
date: 2023-12-11
published-title: "dernière mise à jour"
engine: knitr
freeze: false
file: "trombinoscope_2023-2024_v2023-12-11.pdf"
grid:
  sidebar-width: 0px
  body-width: 1000px
  margin-width: 0px
---

```{css echo=FALSE}
.embed-container {

    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 136%;
    max-width: 100%;
    
    iframe, object, embed {
    
        position: absolute;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
    
    }
    
}
```

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="`r rmarkdown::metadata$file`" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i>&ensp;PDF
  </a>
</p>

<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="`r rmarkdown::metadata$file`" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
